description: Output contract for the price-scraper agent. Validated by SubagentStop hook.
delta_percent_convention: positive = client overpriced vs cheapest competitor; negative = client underpriced
cross_currency_delta: shown as dash (—) when client currency != competitor currency
match_reliable_flag: Delta% shows 'Összehasonlítás megbízhatatlan (eltérő termék)' when product name similarity score is below 0.45 — indicates the compared price may be for a different product
